LOP-MS6-MSMATH6-CYP-LAT-01 • L4 • 1000–1300L • MS Math Grade 6 • Percent as Rate per 100

The Festival Coin Path

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a teacher talking about percent at a community festival. Listen carefully. You will hear the information only once. After listening, you will answer some questions. As you listen, you may use the blank areas in your Test Book to take notes.
Listen to the Presentation
1QUESTION 1: What is the teacher mainly explaining?
2QUESTION 2: According to the teacher, what does the word percent mean?
3QUESTION 3: In every path the teacher describes, what is true about the three booth totals?
4QUESTION 4: Why does the teacher say the math is already done for you?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
